mentions.note: Semiconductor capital equipment maker, up 137% in 2025; called when memory companies need capacity expansion. Huge move today (+5%). Essential to data center memory buildout.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker benefiting from storage and memory chip shortage; running flat out to produce manufacturing machines.
Semiconductor capital equipment play; focused on as sector winner alongside Applied Materials.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker for etch/deposition; rallied as Taiwan Semi's growth validates foundry capex and equipment supplier demand.
Gone parabolic since September (low 90s to 220+); excellent CEO Tim Archer is great, but market overbought by oscillator—buy only 25 shares, wait for pullback to add.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker; $100B Micron fab will drive hardware demand; triad of AMAT/KLAC/LRCX benefits from capacity expansion.
CEO Tim Archer excellent; parabolic move from low 90s to 220; market overbought — buy 25 shares per 100 desired, wait for pullback.
Semiconductor capital equipment; profiting from memory shortage but capacity ramp will end shortage; cut positions significantly after parabolic moves.
Semiconductor equipment maker machinery in short supply; every-day buying support; bottleneck extends memory shortage.
Semiconductor equipment maker; machinery in short supply alongside memory chips, supporting continued shortage and price power.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker; hit today on Intel pin action but I think mistaken — industry in great shape, just Intel's execution problem.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker benefiting from memory/storage shortage; guilt-by-association selloff with Intel unjustified.

Cramer's personal favorite semiconductor capital equipment company; up 137% last year + 39% January; makes equipment for CPU and memory chips; beat-and-raise baked in but 2027 numbers likely better; buy any dip.
Semiconductor capital equipment supplier benefiting from chip shortage and foundry buildout; ripping on shortage tailwinds.

Semiconductor capital equipment maker; #6 January performer, up ~40%. Great results Thursday but sold off 6% Friday on profit-taking. Cramer: leg in 1/4 at a time; capacity oversupply likely late 2027–early 2028.
Semiconductor capital equipment critical to memory expansion; long manufacturing lead times extend shortage; enables memory makers to boost production.
Semiconductor equipment maker collateral damage in hardware sector selloff.
Semiconductor equipment play; beneficiary of data center capex; not discussed in depth but part of capex commentary.
Semiconductor equipment manufacturer; implied positive view via broader semiconductor complex strength discussion; paired with KLA, Teradyne as semiconductor winners.
Caller Ralph: best intellectual property in semiconductor equipment; sell equipment to TSMC, Samsung, Intel; Cramer says buy more, average down regardless of entry.
Semi cap equipment maker, less risky than memory stocks. Memory shortage ultimately drives business. Buy on pullback post-oil shock.
Semiconductor play. 'March in like lion, out like lamb'—Betsy (California) caller nailed it. Cramer agrees; buy 50 Monday, 50 more if down 10%. Winner.
Equipment maker for memory production; benefits from data-center demand but commodity-exposed. Cramer views as pernicious drag; prefers high-IP alternatives.
Semiconductor manufacturing equipment play; hardware build-out beneficiary.
Builds semiconductor capital equipment for memory; could be explosive quarter; watch for signs of demand sustainability for Seagate, Western Digital, SanDisk.
Semiconductor equipment; Cramer's preferred order: Lam, AMAT, KLA. Critical IP for alleviating chip shortages.
Semiconductor equipment play benefiting from data center buildout but no specific take given in segment.
Two best capex plays for AI data center buildout alongside Applied Materials.
Semiconductor equipment manufacturer; critical to capacity expansion amid shortage.
Semiconductor equipment competitor in same supply-constrained position as AMAT; can still buy despite recent strength.
Semcap equipment supplier alongside AMAT; solving shortage by 2027 timeframe when SpaceX data centers come online.
Semiconductor fab equipment play; shortage in capital equipment creating demand; up 190% YTD.
